sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have issued a "Hold" consensus rating for Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) from 31 research firms, with an average 12-month target price of $356.62. The company recently completed an early clinical trial for a cancer therapy and is set to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 30, with some analysts forecasting a potential earnings decline. Amgen previously beat Q4 estimates, provided FY2026 guidance, and declared a quarterly dividend of $2.52.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) Given Average Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from nine analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $143.71. The company recently reported Q1 earnings that slightly beat estimates and raised its quarterly dividend, reaching an annual yield of approximately 3.9%. Institutional investors show significant interest, with 78.83% of the stock owned by them.

feed.title: Why Investors Hold Medtronic, Sanofi, and Bristol Myers Squibb for Dividends - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Despite share price declines, some investors continue to hold healthcare stocks like Medtronic, Sanofi, and Bristol Myers Squibb due to their attractive dividend yields. Medtronic has increased its dividend for 48 consecutive years despite facing rising costs and shrinking profits. Sanofi and Bristol Myers Squibb also offer respectable dividends while shareholders anticipate a recovery.

feed.title: CVRx, Inc. (NASDAQ:CVRX) Receives Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: CVRx, Inc. (NASDAQ:CVRX) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with a 1-year average price target of $10.50, despite missing recent Q4 earnings estimates. The company reported ($0.46) EPS against an estimated ($0.42) and $16.02 million in revenue. Insider activity shows Director Mudit K. Jain increased his stake by purchasing 46,800 shares.

feed.title: UPAR Ultra Risk Parity ETF (UPAR) stock price, news, quote and history

The ETF is actively managed and aims to replicate the returns of the Advanced Research Ultra Risk Parity Index, targeting leveraged exposure to its underlying assets. Key metrics such as net assets, inception date, trailing returns, and sector weightings are also presented.

feed.title: Curbline Properties (NYSE:CURB) Rating Increased to Sell at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Curbline Properties (NYSE:CURB) from a "strong sell" to a "sell" rating. Despite this, the consensus among other analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $28.25, with several firms recently increasing their ratings or targets. Curbline Properties missed quarterly EPS expectations but saw a 55.2% year-over-year revenue increase and projected FY2026 EPS guidance between $1.170 and $1.210.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF hits $184M inflows amid US-Iran ceasefire
feed.summary: The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF ($MSBT) has accumulated $184 million in total inflows without any outflows, a phenomenon coinciding with relaxed geopolitical tensions after a U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Despite these significant inflows, the fund's activity has not strongly influenced short-term predictions for Bitcoin reaching a new all-time high by June 30, with interest shifting towards longer-term predictions. Current market trading volumes are low, and the prediction markets show notable sensitivity to single large orders.

feed.title: Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) Rating Lowered to "Hold" at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) from a "Buy" to a "Hold" rating. Despite this downgrade, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average target price of $533.50, and Hubbell provided FY2026 EPS guidance between $19.150 and $19.850. Recent insider transactions show significant selling activity, including CEO Gerben Bakker selling shares worth approximately $12.6 million.

feed.title: Wall Street Zen Upgrades Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) to Hold
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating, though the consensus among other analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $149.42. The company is involved in significant strategic acquisitions, including a $1.6 billion deal for Forvia’s auto-interiors business and a 40% stake in Pembina Gas Infrastructure, aiming to boost fee-earning and stable cash flows. However, investor sentiment is impacted by a pending securities class action alleging undisclosed payments, which presents a short-term risk.

feed.title: NiSource’s Big Tech Data Center Power Deals Might Change The Case For Investing In NiSource (NI)
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has secured significant long-term energy agreements with Alphabet and an expanded deal with Amazon to power large data centers in northern Indiana using its NIPSCO GenCo model. These deals are projected to deliver substantial aggregate cost savings for existing customers, residential bill credits, and a community fund, fundamentally reshaping NiSource's investment narrative. The success of these initiatives, however, hinges on seamless execution and regulatory approvals, which could pose risks to projected returns and cash flow if delayed.

feed.title: Is Corporación América Airports (NYSE:CAAP) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Corporación América Airports (NYSE:CAAP) has experienced a recent share price pullback but is still considered attractive based on valuation metrics. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 68.4% undervalued, arriving at an intrinsic value of $79.17 per share compared to its current price of US$25.00. While its P/E ratio of 16.47x is slightly above the industry average, it aligns closely with its calculated "Fair Ratio" of 16.44x, indicating it is approximately fairly priced based on its specific characteristics.

feed.summary: A. G. P. has initiated coverage on BOS Better Online Solutions (BOSC.US) with a Buy rating. The firm has also set a target price of $8 for the company's stock.

feed.title: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Downgraded by Wall Street Zen to "Buy"
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded RTX (NYSE:RTX) from a "strong-buy" to a "buy" rating, which contributed to a 2.7% fall in the company's shares. Despite this downgrade, RTX reported a strong Q1 earnings beat and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance. Analysts collectively maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for RTX with an average price target of $206.59, though recent insider selling activity has been noted.

feed.title: Prologis (NYSE:PLD) Cut to Sell at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen downgraded Prologis (NYSE:PLD) from a "hold" to a "sell" rating on Sunday, despite the real estate investment trust beating Q1 expectations with $1.05 EPS and $2.30 billion revenue, and setting FY2026 guidance. This downgrade contrasts with other analysts who have recently raised price targets for Prologis, resulting in an overall "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $147.29.

feed.title: Aviat Networks (NASDAQ:AVNW) Stock Rating Lowered by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has downgraded Aviat Networks (NASDAQ:AVNW) from a "buy" to a "hold" rating. Despite this, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $34.50. The company recently reported Q1 earnings that beat expectations, with EPS of $0.54 against estimates of $0.48, and revenues of $111.47 million.

feed.title: Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) Upgraded at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating. The company maintains a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $24.73 among analysts. Kimco Realty's stock opened at $23.70, trades above its 50-day and 200-day simple moving averages, and is largely institutionally owned.

feed.title: Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) Downgraded to "Buy" Rating by Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) was downgraded by Wall Street Zen from a "strong-buy" to a "buy" rating, with the overall analyst consensus remaining "Hold" and an average target price of $86.92. The company surpassed its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and provided FY2026 guidance in line with analyst expectations. Insiders have sold a significant amount of shares recently, though institutional investors have adjusted their holdings with some increasing and others decreasing their stakes.

feed.title: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to Hold Rating
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" among analysts with an average price target of $138.18. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS estimates and reported a 13.2% increase in revenue year-over-year, while forecasting optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance. Despite recent share sales by two executive VPs, institutional investors hold a significant 75% stake in the utility company, which trades near $134.73 with a market capitalization of approximately $73.2 billion.

feed.title: Assessing Century Communities (CCS) Valuation After Guidance Cut And Macro Headwinds
feed.summary: Century Communities (CCS) has cut its full-year 2026 guidance for home deliveries and sales revenue due to higher interest rates, gas prices, and geopolitical headwinds. While the company's share price saw a recent bump, its longer-term performance has been challenging. The article presents two valuation views: one suggests CCS is 16.9% undervalued at $72, based on growth assumptions, while a more cautious DCF model pegs its fair value at a significantly lower $30.95, indicating potential overvaluation.

feed.title: Dragonfly Energy slides after pricing $5.5M stock offering
feed.summary: Dragonfly Energy's stock fell as the company announced the pricing of a $5.5 million underwritten public offering of over 6.8 million shares and warrants. The offering is expected to close around April 30, 2026, and includes warrants to purchase an additional 6.8 million shares. The net proceeds are earmarked for working capital and general corporate purposes.

feed.title: ASML Stock’s AI Boom Has a Catch: TSMC Won’t Rush the $410 Million Machine
feed.summary: ASML's stock is experiencing an AI-driven boom, but a key uncertainty arises from TSMC, its largest client, which is delaying the adoption of ASML's most advanced $410 million High-NA EUV machines. While ASML has raised its sales forecast and sees strong demand for chips, TSMC's decision to stick with existing EUV technology for now could impact the sales trajectory of ASML's priciest equipment. Analysts suggest this might be a timing issue rather than a fundamental shift, with Intel and Samsung still showing interest in the High-NA technology.

feed.title: Latest ASTC News - Astrotech Reports Second Quarter of Fiscal ...
feed.summary: This page serves as a dedicated resource for investors tracking Astrotech Corporation (Nasdaq: ASTC), a mass spectrometry company focused on developing technology-driven businesses. It compiles news related to the deployment of its TRACER 1000 and EN-SCAN products, financial results, executive appointments, and strategic reviews. Recent updates cover its Q2 FY2026 financial results, the appointment of a new Director of Global Sales for 1st Detect, and the company's readiness to support the U.S. aviation security modernization initiative.

feed.title: Crane NXT to acquire 30% stake in Antares Vision for €120M, plans to take company private
feed.summary: Crane NXT is set to acquire a 30% stake in the Italian company Antares Vision for €120 million. This acquisition is part of Crane NXT's strategic plan to eventually take Antares Vision private, further expanding its portfolio in the authentication and protection technologies sector.

feed.title: United Bankshares, Byline Bancorp, and Ameris Bancorp: Caution Advised in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Despite a strong banking sector performance, an analysis advises caution for investors regarding United Bankshares (UBSI), Byline Bancorp (BY), and Ameris Bancorp (ABCB). United Bankshares shows unexciting net interest income and EPS growth, while Byline Bancorp exhibits below-standard revenue growth and less profitable incremental sales. Ameris Bancorp is mentioned generally but without specific additional risks.

feed.title: Globe Life Q1 earnings miss estimates, rise Y/Y on higher premiums
feed.summary: This article analyzes Globe Life's Q1 earnings, highlighting that while earnings per share missed estimates, they rose year-over-year due to increased premiums. The content would detail the financial results and key factors contributing to the performance.

feed.title: Dow (DOW) Is Up 8.6% After Beating Q1 Estimates And Announcing CEO Transition And ESOP Shelf - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Dow Inc. reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, beating analyst expectations on adjusted earnings and revenue despite a net loss and ongoing supply disruptions. The company also announced a CEO transition, with Karen S. Carter taking over from Jim Fitterling in July 2026, and a significant ESOP-related shelf registration. While the current investment narrative relies on cost cuts and asset rationalization to overcome near-term challenges, the Q1 performance does not fundamentally alter the balance of catalyst and risk, with leadership continuity and managing elevated feedstock costs amid Middle East disruptions being key factors.

feed.title: Does KE Holdings’ Governance Overhaul and ESG Push Reframe Its Long‑Term Risk Profile (BEKE)?
feed.summary: KE Holdings Inc. is amending its bylaws to align with Hong Kong’s Corporate Governance Code and has released its 2025 ESG report, aiming to enhance transparent oversight, integrate climate-linked incentives, and improve consumer and data protection. While these governance and ESG initiatives address long-standing concerns and support the company's long-term investment narrative through AI-driven efficiency and higher-margin service lines, they do not resolve near-term earnings risks from a challenging Chinese property market and rising costs. Investors should weigh these improvements against potential risks like analysts' pessimistic forecasts, which suggest slower revenue growth and earnings below current projections.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Iron Mountain (IRM) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (IRM) has seen significant share price appreciation over the past year, but a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is still undervalued by approximately 27.0%. The article explores two valuation approaches and presents "Narratives" for bullish and bearish cases, with intrinsic values ranging from US$71.53 to US$160.00, to help investors assess if the current US$116 price offers value.

feed.title: A Look At Yum Brands (YUM) Valuation As Pizza Hut Review Signals Possible Portfolio Shift
feed.summary: Yum! Brands (YUM) is reportedly reviewing its Pizza Hut business, including a potential sale, which could alter its brand portfolio. While Pizza Hut's future is under consideration, Taco Bell and KFC continue to drive the company's momentum. Despite a mixed short-term share price performance, Yum! Brands has delivered a 47.2% total shareholder return over five years and is currently trading at a slight intrinsic discount, suggesting potential upside that analysts are watching closely.

feed.title: Wynn Honors the Top-Tier Wines of China at the 2026 Wynn Signature Chinese Wine Awards Ceremony
feed.summary: Wynn recently hosted its third annual Signature Chinese Wine Awards ceremony at Wynn Palace, celebrating the best of Chinese wines. The event, supported by Macao government tourism and cultural offices, saw 36 trophies awarded, with Amethyard Petit Manseng Sweet White Wine 2024 receiving the highest honor as "Best Wine of China." Following the ceremony, Wynn will launch global promotional initiatives to increase awareness and market expansion for these top-tier Chinese wines.

feed.title: Stronger Margins And Raised Outlook Might Change The Case For Investing In CSX (CSX)
feed.summary: CSX Corporation recently reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue and net income improving year-over-year due to strengthened operating margins and reduced costs. The company also announced improvements in safety, fuel efficiency, and network performance, leading management to raise its full-year revenue and margin guidance. This positive outlook suggests that ongoing efficiency efforts and infrastructure upgrades could support higher volumes and profitability for CSX.

feed.title: Price to cash flow ratio of Alamo Group Inc. – SWB:AL3
feed.summary: This article provides financial data for Alamo Group Inc. (SWB:AL3), specifically focusing on its price-to-cash-flow ratio. It includes historical values and percentage changes for this metric over various periods, as shown on the Stuttgart Stock Exchange. The content is primarily a data display page from TradingView.

feed.title: Western Union Reshapes Remittances With Digital Deals And New Stablecoin
feed.summary: Western Union (NYSE: WU) is undergoing a significant transformation by focusing on digital payments, including acquisitions in Mexico and Singapore, and launching its proprietary USDPT stablecoin for internal settlements. These strategic moves, along with AI-driven efficiency programs, aim to reshape its long-standing remittance business amidst challenging earnings. Investors are watching to see how these initiatives will impact the company's profitability and market position in the global money transfer landscape, especially given increased debt and regulatory risks.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group to offer $700M in convertible notes due 2028
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group announced its plan to offer $700 million in convertible senior notes, due in 2028. The offering is subject to market conditions, and a portion may be used to repurchase existing notes.

feed.title: Cash-Rich Stocks: Why State Street and Live Oak Bancshares Are Sells, Tradeweb Markets a Buy - News and Statistics
feed.summary: StockStory's analysis challenges the common perception that a cash-rich balance sheet always signifies financial health, arguing that it can sometimes indicate weak business models or lack of expansion opportunities. The report recommends selling State Street (NYSE:STT) and Live Oak Bancshares (NYSE:LOB) due to growth difficulties and profitability concerns, despite their substantial cash reserves. Conversely, Tradeweb Markets (NASDAQ:TW) is recommended as a buy, lauded for its impressive revenue and earnings growth and expanding market share.

feed.title: Boeing Regains Delivery Lead Over Airbus As Q1 Revenues Jump
feed.summary: Boeing reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, surpassing Airbus in commercial aircraft deliveries for the first time since 2019, with 143 deliveries compared to Airbus's 114. The company's revenues jumped, reflecting higher commercial delivery volume and improved operational performance, narrowing losses, and expanding its backlog to a record $695 billion. Boeing's Commercial Airplanes segment booked 140 net orders and delivered 143 planes, maintaining a production rate of 42 737s per month, while the Defense, Space & Security and Global Services segments also contributed significantly to revenue.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies: Growth Continues To Impress, But Valuation Is Getting Lofty
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies (AMPX) is showing strong revenue growth in its high-density drone battery niche and is expected to achieve profitability within a year due to margin expansion. However, the author raising concerns about the company's high valuation and technical stock setup, suggesting a potential near-term correction. The article serves as an update on the company's Q4 2025 results and recent developments.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) is scheduled to report earnings tomorrow after market close. Analysts expect a 16.4% year-over-year revenue growth, slowing from the previous year's 23.1%. The company has a strong record of beating revenue estimates, and recent positive investor sentiment in the vertical software segment has seen CDNS shares rise 22.5% over the last month.

feed.title: Dakota Gold drops 6%, prices $75M stock offering
feed.summary: Dakota Gold Corp. (NYSE: DC) shares fell by 6% in pre-market trading after announcing the pricing of an upsized underwritten public offering of 30,000,000 shares of its common stock at $2.50 per share, aiming to raise $75 million. The offering includes a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase an additional 4,500,000 shares. The net proceeds will primarily fund exploration and development of their Black Hills properties in South Dakota.

feed.title: Tel-Aviv Court Clears L.I.A. Pure Capital Buyout of Xylo Technologies
feed.summary: The Tel-Aviv District Court has approved the Section 350 Arrangement for L.I.A. Pure Capital Ltd. to acquire all outstanding shares of Xylo Technologies Ltd. The transaction, which shareholders approved on May 27, 2025, must be completed within 180 days, leading to XYLO's delisting from Nasdaq and the termination of its U.S. public-company reporting obligations. This approval removes the primary legal hurdle for the take-private deal.

feed.title: Yunhong Green CTI Ltd. Announces Appointment of Fred H.F. Chak as A Director of the Company, Effective March 27, 2026
feed.summary: Yunhong Green CTI Ltd. announced the appointment of Fred H.F. Chak as a Director of the company, effective March 27, 2026. The appointment was made by the company's Board of Directors. This news comes amidst other recent board and executive changes for the company.

feed.title: CUE BIOPHARMA O.N. Financial Statements – MUN:1UC0
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of CUE BIOPHARMA O.N.'s financial statements, listed on the Munich Stock Exchange under the ticker 1UC0. It details key facts about the company, including its business in developing immunotherapies, its founding, and its headquarters. The article notes a lack of available market capitalization, revenue, or net income data, and confirms that the company has never paid dividends.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High of $228.19
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. has achieved a new 52-week high of $228.19, demonstrating strong performance in the ferrous metals industry with an 83.92% one-year growth. The company, a mid-cap with a $36,899 million market capitalization, shows solid financial health through its P/E ratio of 31.00, a 1.83% dividend yield, and effective capital management with a 0.38 debt-to-equity ratio. This milestone highlights its robust market position and profitability.

feed.title: A Look At S&P Global's Valuation As It Reshapes Its Upstream Energy And AI Offerings
feed.summary: S&P Global (SPGI) is adapting its business, selling its geoscience and petroleum engineering software to SLB while launching an AI-powered platform, Titan, for energy data. The stock's recent performance shows cooling momentum despite these AI-driven initiatives, leading to mixed views on its current valuation. Analysts see SPGI as undervalued at $534.05, while other models suggest it might be overvalued, trading around $436.79.

feed.title: Does Abivax (ENXTPA:ABVX) Still Offer Upside After A 15x One-Year Surge In Price
feed.summary: ABIVAX Société Anonyme has seen a significant 15x surge in its stock price over the last year, despite recent mixed returns. Simply Wall St's analysis, using a Discounted Cash Flow model, suggests the stock is currently 86.5% undervalued, while a Price to Book ratio comparison indicates it is overvalued compared to industry averages. The article encourages investors to consider different valuation narratives and fundamental data, noting that the company is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focusing on chronic inflammatory diseases.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) Margin Expansion Supports Bullish Earnings Narrative In Q1 2026
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) reported strong Q1 2026 results with US$3.6 billion in revenue and US$0.85 EPS, demonstrating improved profitability and a significant margin expansion. The company's net income growth is outpacing revenue growth, bolstering the bullish argument that LVS's earnings power is increasing despite moderate revenue forecasts. However, bears point to the company's high debt load, reliance on Macao and Singapore, and slower projected revenue growth as potential risks not fully reflected in its P/E ratio.

feed.title: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Offering A Fair Entry Point At Around US$76 Per Share
feed.summary: This article by Simply Wall St analyzes Coca-Cola's (KO) valuation, suggesting it might be undervalued at its current price of approximately US$76.63 per share. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratios, the article indicates KO could be trading at a discount. It also explores various "narratives" to help investors form their own fair value estimates, considering both bull and bear cases for the stock.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Reports Earnings Tomorrow: What To Expect
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) is set to report earnings, with analysts expecting revenue growth of 34.8% year over year. The company missed revenue expectations last quarter, and its peers in the professional services sector have shown mixed results. Investor sentiment in the professional services segment has been positive, with Brown & Brown's stock up 4.8% over the last month.

feed.title: Crane (CR) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
feed.summary: Crane (CR) is set to report its Q1 earnings, with the market anticipating a 20.3% year-on-year revenue growth. The company beat revenue expectations last quarter, and analysts have reconfirmed their estimates, suggesting a steady outlook. While some peers in the general industrial machinery segment have shown mixed results, Crane's share price has seen positive sentiment ahead of its earnings report.
